nasb.text: “Command the sons of Israel and say to them, ‘When you enter the land of Canaan, this is the land that shall fall to you as an inheritance, even the land of Canaan according to its borders.

esv.text: “Command the people of Israel, and say to them, When you enter the land of Canaan (this is the land that shall fall to you for an inheritance, the land of Canaan as defined by its borders),

cnv.text: “你要吩咐以色列人說：‘你們進了迦南地的時候，歸你們作產業的迦南地及它的四境就是以下這些地區。

ccb.text: “你把以下指示告诉以色列人。 “你们进入赐给你们作产业的迦南后，你们四境的疆界如下。
